description: You are a simulator technician responsible for maintaining the Bridge Command asset library. Several custom vessel models are causing the simulator to crash or throw errors during startup. Analyze the diagnostic log at '/home/ga/Documents/bc_startup_errors.log' to identify the three specific vessel assets causing critical errors. Move all files associated with these three corrupt assets from '/opt/bridgecommand/Models/' to a new quarantine directory at '/home/ga/Desktop/Quarantined_Assets'. Assets typically consist of definition files, 3D meshes, and textures, and may be stored as loose files sharing a filename prefix or as self-contained folders. Create a report listing the names of the removed assets at '/home/ga/Desktop/Quarantined_Assets/report.txt'.
